episodes.title: OPINIONATED | @Busisiweinconversation  on her 7 years religious psychosis era in a cult
episodes.description: #OPINIONATED Busisiwe unpacks her story of how she was lured into joining a cult as a varsity student. at first everything seemed normal until she learned that she was in a cult that believed in sex being equivalent to marriage as their marriages in the church were never registered at home affairs. she also learned that a man can marry as many women as possible since marriage is just sex. she also learned that your money and inheritance as a woman belongs to your husband since he has saved you by marrying you. what made her leave the church was when the teachings of the pastor were nor perpetuating child marriages as the pastor would say according to the bible a 10 year old girl is old enough to get married.
